feed.title: SAP Community - NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC)
feed.subtitle: NW ABAP Remote Function Call (RFC) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Enhancement to Update NAST in VA02
entry.content:
Hi All,
I have an output type that is triggered when a custom Z field is updated. This Z field gets updated through a BAPI during the creation of a Post Goods Receipt (PGR) in an STO process. The output sends an email with PO details, which are populated from the updated Z field.

I initially tried using Memory ID to pass the value, but I encountered an issue. When two PGRs are created within a few seconds, the first output picks up the PO value of the second PGR due to the shared nature of Memory IDs. To avoid this, I thought of updating unused fields in the output type instead.

I need an enhancement (user exit or BAdI) to update the output type during the save process in VA02. Could anyone guide me on the best approach or enhancement point to achieve this?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How To Read Data From TCP/IP Socket and Port Using ABAP Program
entry.content:
Dear All ,

 I need to read Machine data using a TCP/IP Ethernet cable.

We have the following data which is going to be used for TCP/IP Ethernet

Local Host IP: 192.xx.xx.xx ( My PC IP address )

Remote Host IP: 192.xx.xx.xx ( Machine device IP address )

Remote Port: 1702

For Example, the Image is attached where the third-party utility is connected with my Remote Hot IP and Port and reads data I need to develop same functionality in SAP Can you help with this 

I also attached the SAP Version that I used.

Third-Party UtilityInstalled SAP VersionInstalled SAP Version

entry.title: how to create two outbound cremas idoc if same vendor is extended to two company codes
entry.content:
Hi, 

we want to create idoc based on company code in CREMAS message type if vendor is extended to two company codes then two separate messages should be created. Thanks

#CREMAS #SPLIT CREMAS OUTBOUND

entry.title: Is there a way to detect whether a BAPI is for read or write through metadata?
entry.content:
Hi all,

Is there any bapi attribute or any other details in the BAPI metadata that can be used to determine if the BAPI is for read or write?

BAPI_USER_GETLIST - reads list of all users - so a read bapi

BAPI_PO_CREATE1 - creates a purchase order - so a write bapi

BAPI_USER_LOCK - changes state of a user to locked - a write bapi

Note: NWRFCSDK is being used for fetching BAPI metadata and other details

Thanks.

entry.title: Using SNC on IBM i SAP NetWeaver RFC SDK 7.50
entry.content:
Hello,

to secure our SAP NetWeaver RFC SDK net communication, we want to use SNC. For that we must download the CommonCryptoLib.

On Windows we can use the environment variable SNC_LIB and set it to to that path of sapcrypto.dll.

On IBM i we use the ILE version (LIBSAPNRFC.SRVPGM), but on the SAP Download site of CommonCryptoLib there is only a PASE version available. Is the ILE version of LIBSAPNRFC is able to use the PASE version of the CommonCryptoLib? Or is there also a ILE version (*SRVPGM) available?

Best regards,
Matthias Schatte

entry.title: Executing OData over BW Query pass back an error 400 for a non mandatory variable
entry.content:
Hello to all of you!

When I am executing an OData service exposing BW Query I include all the variables - the non-mandatory I leave empty like X_0Material='', but about the mandatory one I pass a parameter like X_0Fiscper='001.2025'. Unfortunately for Calday's variable, which is optional it returns error - status code 400 and more precisely "Invalid key predicate type . Expected type is 'Edm.DateTime' ".
I tried with /Date('') and all the variances but it doesn't recognize it.

Every assistance is appreciated.
Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Return data of TRFC / FM IN BACKGROUND TASK
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for a way to get the result of the TRFC and found this FM TRFC_GET_RETURN_DATA but i am not sure yet how to use this and if it can return data of TRFC

This is the sample program, 

 

 

 

CALL FUNCTION 'ZTEST_FM_IN_BG' IN BACKGROUND TASK
  EXPORTING
    var1    = 15
    var2    = 3
    param = p_ok
  TABLES
    t_table = lt_table_main
  .
COMMIT WORK.

 

 

 

Inside the FM, I created a simple program to populate the t_table of RFC

 

 

 

lw_table-var1 = var1.
lw_table-var2 = var2.
lw_table-res = var1 + var2.

APPEND lw_table TO t_table.

 

 

 

the report program is calling the FM and I want to get the value of lt_table_main but its not getting the data because it is a TRFC / using IN BACKGROUND TASK

How to use the TRFC_GET_RETURN_DATA can I get the value of lt_table_main using this FM ?

What are the possible solution/other ways to get the result value of TRFC ? I tried to use Export/Import Memory but its not working in background task. It works if it is ARFC (Asynchronous)

entry.title: Unable to configure trusted RFC no matter what
entry.content:
dear Experts,

We need working trusted RFC connections from Solution Manager to an S/4 Hana system and vice versa.
The connection from S/4 to the Solution Manager works!

However, no matter what we tried, from the Solution Manager to the S/4 system simply doesn't work. It ALWAYS 
comes back with the following error:

What we tried so far:

- Recreated the trusts in SMT1 for both systems!
- Fixed yellow fields of role SAP_S_RFCACL and regenerated the profile and reassigned the roles. Profiles are in place too!
- Parameter rfc/allowoldticket4tt is set to value both on all systems
- Transaction SSO2 is green
- We tried also using role SAP_S_SM_RFCACL
- Resetting all buffers

PLEASE suggest a solution!

entry.title: Using HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am using FM HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA to update numerous infotypes, one record at a time.  When I check the return parameter, no error message is given, but when I try to COMMIT WORK AND WAIT, it aborts, even though I have the COMMIT statement wrapped inside a TRY/CATCH block.  The error implies that it violates a time constraint rule, but to me, the data looks fine.

My question is why doesn't the call to HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA return the error message?

entry.title: I have to trigger idoc for PR create whenever a PR is created using MD03 i need BADI or Enh point
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have to trigger IDOC for PR creation using TCODE MD03 i need to know a BADI or enhancement where i can read the code to trigger i used ME_REQ_POSTED but it works only for ME52n.I need access to both Item and header data to papulate the IDOC.

Thanks

entry.title: I'M unable to get the error message for this CRAP_WORKCENTER_CREATE
entry.content:
hello experts.

Here this  CRAP_WORKCENTER_CREATE  RFC doesn't contain return parameters so that i need to go for logs based on object of logs but I'M unable to find proper FM to read the log message 

how to achieve this .

thanks& regerds.

vikas .t

entry.title: help for to change equipment bom for ib02 t-code
entry.content:
hello experts.

CSAI_BOM_MAINTAIN this function module  is to add the new materials for equipment .

then What about modifying one component that it was created before?

please let me know if any one have worked on this.

thanks&regards.

vikas.t

entry.title: BAPI/FM to create the order for iw31 t-code
entry.content:
hello experts.

i am able to create order details but not able to create components using FM alm_me_order_create.

please suggests me a proper way for to create the components

thanks regards

vikas.t

entry.title: find me a bapi/fm to change the order for iw32 t-code
entry.content:
hello experts.

i want to change the order for iw32 t-code can anyone suggest me a bapi/fm and process to achieve it.

thanks&regards.

vikas.t.

entry.title: find me a bapi/fm to change a order for iw32 t-code
entry.content:
hello experts,

can any one tell me is there any bapi/fm to change the order for iw32 t-code.

if the function module is exits tell me produce for to achieve this.

please help me.

thanks regards.

vikas t.

entry.title: Processing exception during a "Render" operation. .ProcessingException: IO error detected while open
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I am working on adobe form and I am facing system error  as show below.

 


 I have done all the three tests of ADS
FP_TEST_00
FP_CHECK_DESTINATION_SERVICE
FP_PDF_TEST_00

All the three reports are giving the results as expected .

Earlier I did not understand what the system error is about. After going through few threads I could able to trace from where the error is coming and what the error is about.

CREATE_OUTPUT_CURRENT_FORM is the subroutine where I could able to capture the error.

The following is the error :

Processing exception during a "Render" operation. Request start time: Tue Apr 08 14:40:29 IST 2025 com.adobe.ProcessingException: com.adobe.ProcessingException: IO error detected while opening DEST connection: http://100.64.109.143:8080/sap/bc/fp/form/layout/ZMATERIAL_EXP_QA_CHECK2.XDP?fp-language=EN&fp-mlayout-sup=X&fp-cacheinfo=2025-04-07T05:34:18Z$5ef403a9-256d-4ee3-aaef-7f7832056b50$0$en$v1.0$ Exception Stack Trace: com.adobe.

NOTE : I am getting this error only in quality system . It is working fine in Development system.
Can you please let me know what is the cause of this system error and how to fix it. ?


I could able to find one post where the issue is the same as above and solution was offered to open backend system port connection from portal side. The thread is the below one. It is not clear to how to do it.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/problem-trying-read-data-from-destination/qaq-p/4290340

entry.title: Details required on the usage of communication users
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

We are planning to change icf/reject_expired_passwd and rfc/reject_expired_passwd parameters to the value 1 in the systems and before changing the parameter value, we have collected the communication users list for which we need to change the initial user passwords. Before changing the passwords we would like to get the details of RFC's or any other connection name where the users are being used in the interface systems, Can you please share the details like is there any reports or a table on how to fetch the details from the system.

 

 

Thank you.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Intermittent Http_Communication_Failure Error in ABAP Using IF_HTTP_CLIENT->receive
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am intermittently encountering the exception Http_Communication_Failure in my ABAP code when using the method IF_HTTP_CLIENT->receive to send data to external systems (in my case, SAP CPI).

Upon analyzing the short dump, I noticed the following error message:
Connect to hostaddress:443 failed: NIECONN_REFUSED (-10),
and the system variable ME->M_ECODE has the value 411.

Has anyone experienced a similar issue or have any suggestions on how to resolve this?

Thanks in advance,
Ravi Bharti

entry.title: SBGRFCMON How to lock a bgRFC Inbound destination which is empty ?
entry.content:
Hello experts,

we leverage bgRFC queued inbound scenario and like to test the processing. For this, we like to lock our inbound destination in SBGRFCMON. But as long as there are no deleted/failed queue entries for this destination, it is not shown ... so we cannot lock it.

In SMQS we can just register an inactive queue and all entries are queued unprocessed. Similar functionality seems to miss at bgRFC monitor

Example:
These are our available inbound destinations configured

and the bgRFC monitor shows only the ones with entries but not all.

Any ideas how to lock (stop processing of bgRFC inbound queue entries) for a given destination ?

Thanks & best regards,
  Matthias

entry.title: What is the best way to have an external API make a UPDATE/POST call into SAP RDC?
entry.content: Trying to run a postman call into SAP to build a tool for automating erp implementations. RFC seems to be too outdated, so I need a minimum viable path into doing this.
